name: ClawSwarm
desc: A smaller, lighter-weight version of OpenClaw, natively multi-agent, compiles to Rust, and built on the Swarms framework and Swarms ecosystem. One API, unified…
descFull: A smaller, lighter-weight version of OpenClaw, natively multi-agent, compiles to Rust, and built on the Swarms framework and Swarms ecosystem. One API, unified messaging across Telegram, Discord, and WhatsApp with optional Claude-powered reasoning.
